Let's Connect &Find the Right Legal Solution


Whether you need legal guidance, business support, or simply have a question, our legal experts and AI Assistant are here to help.

Need Immediate Answers?


Instead of waiting for a reply, ask LexAssist AI about legal services, business registration, GST, trademarks, contracts, or upload your own PDF for AI-powered assistance.


Frequently Asked Questions



How quickly will I receive a response?


Email inquiries receive replies within 2 hours. AI Chat responses are instant.


Can I schedule a consultation online?


Yes, use our Book Consultation tab to schedule video/phone sessions.


Do you support online consultations?


Yes, online consultations are supported via secure Google Meet / Zoom integrations.


Urgent Legal Matters


If you are facing active ROC audit queries or immediate regulatory actions, contact priority support:

+1 (555) 019-9900


Let's Start Your Legal Journey


Whether you're launching a business, protecting your brand, or looking for legal guidance, LexAssist is ready to help.

Subscribe to our newsletter for bi-weekly legal compliance guide updates, AI regulations reports, and risk management tips.
